subcodes.first_line: O pure leaf! In the presence of the Ancient Beauty - may my spirit be a sacrifice unto His loved ones - thou art remembered even as a candle [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه زکیه در ساحت جمال قدم روحی لارقائه الفدا اماای مذکورند که چون شمع در
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @naming of children; of individuals
